_comment: Runnable (system-1) conformance spec for ticker-load-experience, projected from .claude/contracts/ticker-load-experience/INTERFACE_CONTRACT.md '## 6. Conformance spec' into the flat schema interface_conformance.py executes ({method,path,path_params,query,body,required}). The ONLY wire delta in this feature is the SSE /api/stream last_trade field (number|null), which the HTTP harness cannot probe (no SSE subscription) — it is bound in INTERFACE_CONTRACT §2 and verified off-harness by the FE component/flow tests + the BE live-payload check. The runnable assertions here are the REGRESSION FLOOR that bounds the feature: (1) the REST bundle stays byte-stable on its score/tier/gate/fingerprint path (AC-Invariant-1's wire face — pre-warm/concurrency/coalescing must NOT change what compute_ticker produces), and (2) the operator /api/_metrics readout still parses (the §5 observability-honesty surface a pre-warmed acquisition rides). Uses SPY (a liquid ticker; fetch once before running, e.g. curl http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ticker/SPY).
